description: Two lists of partly identical persons, the first without, the second with sums, ranging from 1 through 11 dirhams and 1/4 dinar. The first list comprises fourty persons, of these some scholars, others foreigners or persons in inferior positions, such as employees or gatekeepers. These lists were probably prepared for the capitation tax, the second list indicating perhaps the sums still due, to be paid by the community if the persons concerned were unable to pay. (Information from Goitein notes and index card linked below and Goitein, MedSoc, Vol. 2, p. 454, no. 54.)
description_he: שתי רשימות של אנשים (חלקן זהות); הראשונה ללא סכומים, השנייה עם סכומים של 1–11 דרהם; כנראה הוכנו לצורך מס גולגולת
